LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, PLAINTIFF ADESA CALIFORNIA LLC DBA BRASHER'S AUTO AUCTIONS, MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE, AS TO TIMOTHY WISEMAN. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. Off Calendar May-30-2017 Continued To Jul-26-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ADESA CALIFORNIA LLC DBA BRASHER'S AUTO AUCTIONS, MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE, as to Timothy Wiseman, is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Moving party shall prepare the proposed order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2017 Continued To Mar-03-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher C. McNatt, of Scopelitis, Garvin, Light, Hanson & Feary, P.C., Tel. 626.795.4700, for plaintiffs ADESA California, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. The Court modifies its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ADESA CALIFORNIA LLC, MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE as to Timothy W. Wiseman is continued to March 3, 2017, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, for further hearing. Counsel agrees to submit a new declaration by February 22, 2017, in compliance with CRC 9.40. Moreover, Mr. Wiseman must provide the information called for in CRC 9.40(d)(5). Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
